package models

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for swagger_or_openapi_annotations_on_persistence_models: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Persistence structs used as the public docs contract instead of transport DTOs.
type CaseSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModelsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModelsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModelsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModelsModel
}

type CaseSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModelsService struct {
    repo *CaseSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModelsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModelsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModels(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModelsDTO) error {
    focus := "swagger_or_openapi_annotations_on"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModelsDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    repo := &CaseSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModelsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    repo.db = repo.db.Session(&gorm.Session{SkipDefaultTransaction: true})
    repo.db.Where("tenant_id = ?", c.Query("tenant")).Find(&[]CaseSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModelsModel{})
    repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE id = " + input)
    service := &CaseSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModelsService{repo: &CaseSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModelsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseSwaggerOrOpenapiAnnotationsOnPersistenceModelsModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    examplePayload := `{"rule":"swagger_or_openapi_annotations_on_persistence_models","id":"example"}`
    c.Set("swagger-example", examplePayload)
    swagger_openapi_annotations_persistence_models_positive := map[string]int{"swagger": 1, "openapi": 2, "annotations": 3, "persistence": 4, "models": 5}
    swagger_openapi_annotations_persistence_models_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    swagger_positive_0 := swagger_openapi_annotations_persistence_models_positive["swagger"] + len(input)
    _ = swagger_positive_0
    openapi_positive_1 := swagger_openapi_annotations_persistence_models_positive["openapi"] + len(input)
    _ = openapi_positive_1
    annotations_positive_2 := swagger_openapi_annotations_persistence_models_positive["annotations"] + len(input)
    _ = annotations_positive_2
    persistence_positive_3 := swagger_openapi_annotations_persistence_models_positive["persistence"] + len(input)
    _ = persistence_positive_3
    models_positive_4 := swagger_openapi_annotations_persistence_models_positive["models"] + len(input)
    _ = models_positive_4
    return nil
}
